message:
feat(telemetry): Add network metrics collection from /proc/net/dev

- Implement NetDevStats struct parsing /proc/net/dev for rx/tx stats
- Add NetworkMetrics with throughput calculation (Mbps conversion)
- Create NetworkCollector with stateful delta-based rate tracking
- Filter virtual interfaces (lo, docker*, veth*, etc.) to physical only
- Track error rates and packet drop rates
- Add NetworkTelemetry snapshot aggregation across interfaces
- Include 12 comprehensive unit tests with detailed logging

Closes remote_compilation_helper-i6x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
